name: Irwin Kostal
abstract: Irwin Kostal (October 1, 1911 – November 23, 1994) was an American musical arranger of films and an orchestrator of Broadway musicals.

about_quotes.speaker: Mandel Johnny
about_quotes.evidence: Irwin Kostal called me and the two of us turned out the music there for a long time for that show.
about_quotes.doc_title: Mandel Johnny — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
